prompt: Premium product photography. An amber glass supplement bottle and a matte white skincare tube on a dark walnut surface, deep forest green background, warm amber accent light from right. Both products have matching cream labels: a small leaf icon at the top of each label, and below it BOTANICA in modern uppercase sans-serif. The labels look like a real premium botanical skincare brand. A small ceramic bowl with dried botanicals between the products. Shallow depth of field. Magazine-quality. 16:9 landscape. Avoid: generic stock photography, mismatched labels, blurry text, neon colors, plastic look, cluttered surfaces.
